# Wholesale Pricing Proposal

## Discount Tiers

Buyers ordering 50 or more desk mats in a quarter enter the first discount tier at 12 percent off list. At 200 units the second tier applies, taking 18 percent off list price across the whole order.

## Payment Terms

New wholesale accounts prepay their first order. After a passing credit check, invoices move to net 30 terms with a 2 percent early-payment incentive at net 10.

## Next Steps

Countersign the tier schedule and return it with the opening purchase order. Tier assignment is reviewed quarterly against trailing volume.
